# zendesk_ticket_field (Resource)

Manages a Zendesk custom ticket field.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `title` (String) The title of the ticket field.
- `type` (String) The custom field type: checkbox, date, decimal, dropdown, integer, multiselect, regexp, text, textarea, tagger, lookup.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether this field is available.
- `agent_description` (String) A description of the ticket field that only agents can see.
- `collapsed_for_agents` (Boolean) If true, the field is shown collapsed to agents by default.
- `custom_field_options` (Attributes List) Options for dropdown (tagger), multiselect fields. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_field_options))
- `description` (String) Describes the purpose of the ticket field to users.
- `editable_in_portal` (Boolean) Whether this field is editable by end users in Help Center.
- `position` (Number) The relative position of the ticket field on a ticket.
- `regexp_for_validation` (String) For regexp fields only. The validation pattern.
- `relationship_target_type` (String) For lookup fields. e.g. zen:user, zen:organization, zen:ticket, zen:custom_object:{key}.
- `required` (Boolean) If true, agents must enter a value to change the ticket status to solved.
- `required_in_portal` (Boolean) If true, end users must enter a value to create the request.
- `sub_type_id` (Number) Sub type ID for system fields of type priority or status.
- `tag` (String) For checkbox fields only. A tag added when selected.
- `title_in_portal` (String) The title of the ticket field for end users in Help Center.
- `visible_in_portal` (Boolean) Whether this field is visible to end users in Help Center.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `removable` (Boolean) Whether this field can be removed.
- `system` (Boolean) Whether this is a system field.
- `updated_at` (String)
- `url` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--custom_field_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `custom_field_options`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `value` (String)

Optional:

- `allow_solving` (Boolean)
- `position` (Number)

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number)
